
.. _program_listing_file_src_misc_dofs.hpp:

Program Listing for File dofs.hpp
=================================

|exhale_lsh| :ref:`Return to documentation for file <file_src_misc_dofs.hpp>` (``src/misc/dofs.hpp``)

.. |exhale_lsh| unicode:: U+021B0 .. UPWARDS ARROW WITH TIP LEFTWARDS

.. code-block:: cpp

   // Prevent multiple inclusion
   #pragma once
   
   #include "types.hpp"
   
   template <index_t size_>
   struct Coordinates {
       static constexpr index_t size = size_;
       Eigen::Matrix<real_t, size, 1> value;
   };
   
   template <index_t size_>
   struct Index {
       index_t start;
       static constexpr index_t size = size_;
   };
